creator: barbara.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Here I am using a different accout.
I fully agree with that, but I've tried to read both (long)
discussions about headers on the ML but it's not easy to understand
the final decision.
To add more confusion, I've also seen some ports using "Whom" some
others "Creator".
In any case, that should be reported here:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/quick-porting.html#PORTING-MAKEFILE
